versions.version_description: Easy to play with capo in 3rd freet. Into The Nigth - Benny Mardones - 1980. Chords based on this version: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=-9URZgAqeqo.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Intro:  [( [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch] )3x  [ch]Fm7[/ch] ] (2x) 
 
[tab]                  [ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Ab[/ch]
She's... just... sixteen years old, “Leave her alone”, they say [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]       [ch]Cm7[/ch]             [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Ab[/ch] 
Se..pa... rated by fools who don't know what love is yet [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] 
But I want you to know [/tab]

Chorus: 
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up I'd take you   [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
Into the night and show you a love   like you've [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]            [ch]Bb[/ch] 
 Never seen, ever seen [/tab]
 
 
[( [ch]Cm7[/ch]  [ch]Gm7[/ch] )3x  [ch]Fm7[/ch] ]  
  
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch] [ch]Cm7[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]
It's like... having a dream where nobody has a heart [/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
It's like... having it all and watching it fall apart [/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Cm7[/ch]                [ch]Gm7[/ch]      [ch]Cm7[/ch]         [ch]Gm7[/ch]  [ch]Ab[/ch]
And I-I-I-I... would wait till the end of time for you [/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Cm7[/ch]      [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]
A-a-and... do it again it's true [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]          [ch]Cm7[/ch]        [ch]Gm7[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]
I can't... measure my love there's nothing to compare it to... ooo-ooo [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch] 
But I want you to know [/tab]

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up I'd take you   [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
Into the night and show you a love   [/tab]
 

[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
If I could fly, I'd pick you up I'd take you   [/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Bb[/ch]       [ch]Gm7[/ch]     [ch]Cm7[/ch]-[ch]Bb[/ch]-[ch]Ab[/ch]
Into the night and show you a love   like you've [/tab]

 Ne... ver seen, e... ver seen [/tab]
